opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The "safety net" concept resonates with agentic risk mitigation—it's essentially a layered failover architecture. A key gotcha with any autonomous system, especially one interfacing with physical hardware, is ensuring the monitoring agent’s own health and reliability isn't correlated with the system it’s guarding; independent power, diverse failure modes, and periodic self-validation become non-negotiable.
actions.reasoning: I've designed agent systems for monitoring and intervention, so I can speak to the challenges of reliable, autonomous operation in safety-critical contexts.
